summary: Admin interface for managing tactic types and delivery methods does not exist. Core domain models and read APIs exist, but admin CRUD operations, UI, and draft mode are not implemented.

decisions.why: Reference data caching strategy - admin changes must invalidate cache
Read/write authorization separation for admin vs requestor roles

target_architecture.why: API architecture and admin interface patterns

models.why: Domain model missing IsActive property required by story
Domain model missing IsActive, RequiresDigitalProvider, RequiresPrinter properties

apis.why: Read APIs for tactic types and delivery methods exist but don't filter by active status
Existing admin controller pattern to follow for new admin endpoints

services.why: Reference data caching implementation - admin changes must invalidate cache
Database schema and EF Core configuration for TacticType and DeliveryMethod

components.why: Admin UI app exists but is placeholder - needs implementation

domain_models.details: TacticType and DeliveryMethod models exist but lack IsActive and provider requirement properties needed for admin functionality

database_schema.details: Tables exist but missing IsActive, RequiresDigitalProvider, RequiresPrinter columns and uniqueness constraint on (DeliveryMethod.Name, TacticTypeId)

read_apis.details: GetTacticTypes and GetDeliveryMethods endpoints exist but don't filter by active status; need separate admin endpoints

admin_apis.details: No admin CRUD endpoints for tactic types or delivery methods; no toggle active/inactive endpoints

admin_ui.details: tactic-admin app exists but is placeholder with no admin pages or forms implemented

authorization.details: Admin role exists and authorization framework is in place, but new admin endpoints need authorization checks

business_rules.details: No validation for: cannot delete (only mark inactive), inactive hidden from requestors, show only types with methods, draft mode with save

implementation_phases.phase_1_database: Add IsActive, RequiresDigitalProvider, RequiresPrinter columns; add uniqueness constraint
implementation_phases.phase_2_domain_models: Update TacticType and DeliveryMethod models with new properties
implementation_phases.phase_3_admin_apis: Create admin CRUD endpoints with authorization and cache invalidation
implementation_phases.phase_4_read_api_updates: Modify read queries to filter by active status for non-admin users
implementation_phases.phase_5_admin_ui: Build admin pages with list views, forms, draft mode, and toggle UI
implementation_phases.phase_6_testing: Create unit and E2E tests for admin workflows
